doctors.name: Eric G. Jackson
doctors.credential: DDS, MAGD, FICOI, FASD, FICD, FADI, FPFA, FACD

owner_operator_stated: Eric G. Jackson, DDS, MAGD, FICOI, FASD, FICD, FADI, FPFA, FACD is stated as the practice owner.
notes: Vendor hint (jacksonfamilydentistry.us) was correct. Record legal name 'Oral Healthcare Professionals' is the LLC behind the DBA 'Jackson Family Dentistry' -- address (2033 Ogden Ave) and phone (630-963-6750) match exactly, and CareCredit/Vitals list 'Oral Health Care Professionals LLC' at this same address/phone. The current site names only Dr. Eric Jackson as owner; an older third-party listing also named a Jeffrey S. Wascher, DDS as a co-dentist, but he does not appear on the current jacksonfamilydentistry.us site. Independent single-office practice, no DSO/group branding found.

owner_operator_stated: Site names Dr. Cristina Campero, DMD; the record's named entity Nugent and Sack DDS (Dr. Brian Nugent / Dr. William Sack) is no longer associated with this address.
notes: SUCCESSOR: address (425 Burlington Ave) and phone (630-968-5900) exactly match the record on downersgrovedental.com's own contact page, but the current operator is 'Downers Grove Dental and Orthodontics' led by Dr. Cristina Campero, DMD -- not Nugent and Sack DDS. Third-party review evidence (patient review, Jan 2025) indicates Dr. Brian Nugent sold the practice and retired around Feb 2025; William Sack also no longer appears. No DSO/group branding found on the successor's site (single-location, independently branded).

owner_operator_stated: Site states Dr. Kaur offers general/cosmetic dentistry 'along with associates' at this location; no affiliation with Dental Dreams LLC (the record's named entity) was found.
notes: SUCCESSOR/MISMATCH: address (7335 Lemont Rd) and phone (630-884-8174) exactly match the record on aliviodentalcare.com's own location page, but the current operator is 'Alivio Dental,' not Dental Dreams LLC (a known national DSO brand). No evidence found linking Alivio Dental to Dental Dreams. Alivio Dental is itself a small 2-location group (Aurora + Downers Grove, IL), so this is a mini-chain, not a solo independent. A guessed careers URL (aliviodentalcare.com/careers/) returned 404 -- no hiring page located.

No corroborated official website found for McKee & McKee, P.C. (per third-party listings CareCredit/Healthgrades/Yelp, practice is 'James & Lisa McKee, DDS' at 6224 Main St Ste A, Downers Grove, phone 630-963-1458) -- CareCredit and Yelp pages both blocked WebFetch (403), and no independent practice domain was located. Vendor hint 'airedental.com' is WRONG: it belongs to a DIFFERENT, unrelated practice (Aire Dental Group / Dr. Nader Amiran, DMD) in the same building at 6224 Main St but Suite C (not Suite A), with no phone match to this record found on that site.

owner_operator_stated: Practice led by Glenn DeWeirdt, DDS, per hobsondental.com content indexed in search results.
notes: hobsondental.com blocked direct WebFetch (403 on homepage, /contact, /doctors-credentials) but Google-indexed search snippets directly quote the site's own contact/locations/doctors-credentials pages confirming address 7409 Woodridge Dr Suite B and phone (630) 810-1199 exactly, plus owner Dr. Glenn DeWeirdt, DDS. No careers/hiring page found among the site's indexed pages (contact, our-locations, doctors-credentials, our-office, about-us, privacy).

Address (7451 Woodward Ave #102) and phone (630-725-0947) exactly match on urbandentalil.com's own contact page. Vendor hint domain 'urbandentalcareil.com' is a similarly-named but DIFFERENT, unverified domain -- not used as evidence since it was never fetched/corroborated. The practice's own site names no individual dentist and has no careers/hiring page; a third-party listing (Healthgrades) associates Dr. Sudhir Bhatia, DDS with this address, but that name does not appear on the practice's own site, so he is not listed as a confirmed doctor here.
